critical_path: R001 -> R002 -> R003/R004 -> R015 (fresh integration gate)
highest_risk_seam: R003/R004 decimal migration across all engines + securities float removal

tasks.title: Spec shared decimal type
tasks.description: Write an architecture spec for a single shared fixed-point money type at src/shared/pkg/types/decimal (or a new shared module). Requirements: scale 10^4 (4 dp) to match Decimal(18,4); checked multiply/divide that returns an explicit overflow error instead of silently wrapping int64 (margin-engine MulDecimal currently wraps); banker's (round-half-to-even) rounding with an explicit policy; divide-by-zero returns an error, never DecimalZero(); a complete API surface (Add, Sub, Mul, MulInt64, Div, DivInt64, Cmp, Equal, Neg, IsNeg, Max, Parse, String) so no service needs a divergent local copy. Document the migration contract the 6 engines and securities-service will implement. Produce: docs/specs/R001_shared_decimal_spec.md and the protobuf/interface contract.

tasks.title: Implement shared decimal module
tasks.description: Implement the shared decimal type per docs/specs/R001_shared_decimal_spec.md as an importable Go module (src/shared/pkg/types/decimal). Use int128 (math/bits) or checked int64 so Mul/Div cannot silently overflow; return errors on overflow and divide-by-zero; implement banker's rounding. Include exhaustive unit tests (boundary/overflow/rounding/parse). Target 90%+ coverage on this package (financial-critical). Do NOT yet migrate consumers — that is R003/R004.

tasks.title: Migrate engines to shared decimal
tasks.description: Replace the six divergent local Decimal copies (matching-engine, clearing-engine, margin-engine, settlement-engine, market-data-service, warehouse-service internal/types|internal/.../decimal.go) with the shared module via go.mod replace directives. Delete the local copies. Fix every call site; in particular replace margin-engine MulDecimal (decimal.go:98, silent overflow) and all truncating DivInt/DivInt64 with the checked/rounded shared ops. Ensure all existing engine tests still pass. Note the 'zero-dependency module' claim is already broken by kafka-go, so adding a shared internal dependency is acceptable.

tasks.title: Remove float money math in securities-service
tasks.description: Replace all float64 money math in securities-service with the shared decimal type. Targets: internal/engine/engine.go:678-681 (AvgCost/MarketValue/UnrealizedPnl) and auction.go:346-363; internal/settlement/engine.go:79 and equities.go:186 (NetAmount = Price*Quantity); internal/settlement/engine.go:207-220 (bond accrued interest days*couponRate*parValue/365); internal/protocol/message.go:36 (uint64(price*PriceScale) truncation). Settlement cash, P&L, and accrual must use the shared decimal so values reconcile with the int-based engines. Update tests.

tasks.title: Decimal reconciliation & property tests
tasks.description: Add property-based and reconciliation tests for money math: (1) Mul/Div round-trip and rounding-direction invariants; (2) overflow on large notionals now errors instead of wrapping; (3) divide-by-zero errors; (4) cross-service reconciliation — a trade priced and quantified the same way produces identical settlement cash in securities-service and the settlement-engine (the previous float-vs-int boundary). Place in tests/ and per-service _test.go where appropriate.

tasks.title: Money-path audit
tasks.description: Static audit confirming no residual float64 or silent truncation remains in any price/quantity/cash/P&L/margin/settlement path across all services after R003/R004. grep for float64, /365, *PriceScale, DivInt, MulDecimal; verify each is gone or justified. Write findings to handoff/R006.md with a pass/fail verdict per service.

tasks.title: Kafka fail-fast wiring
tasks.description: Stop the silent in-process fallback. In every service's internal/kafka/wiring.go, when not in test mode and KAFKA_BROKERS is unset, fail fast (log.Fatal / return error) instead of returning the in-process ChannelProducer/ChannelConsumer. Restrict the channel adapter strictly to unit tests (e.g. via an explicit test constructor, not an env-absence default). This prevents matching->clearing->margin->settlement events being silently dropped in any multi-process deployment.

tasks.title: Fix engine concurrency bugs
tasks.description: Three fixes: (1) clearing-engine internal/engine/engine.go ~:110 ClearTrade invokes e.tradeHandler inside the e.mu critical section — move the callback after unlock (same pattern in margin-engine internal/margincall/service.go ~:88). (2) settlement-engine internal/engine/engine.go:71-79 getInstrumentConfig reads e.instruments without the lock that RegisterInstrument (:65-67) holds — guard the read (RLock) to remove the concurrent map read/write race. (3) SetTradeHandler/SetCycleHandler/SetMarginHandler write handler fields with no synchronization — use atomic.Value or require set-before-serve and document it.

tasks.title: Concurrency race tests
tasks.description: Add go test -race coverage exercising concurrent ClearTrade + callback, concurrent RegisterInstrument during a settlement cycle, and concurrent handler invocation, proving R008's fixes. Ensure these tests fail on the pre-fix code and pass after. Document how to run the suite with -race in tests/ README.

tasks.title: Adopt shared tenant module
tasks.description: Wire the existing, well-built shared tenant package (src/shared/internal/tenant) into the services via go.mod replace so they stop using duplicate local copies. Delete the orphaned duplicate tenant registry src/platform-control (the gateway never routes to it; platform-service is the live one). Do NOT yet implement row-level isolation — that is in the deferred MSE-prerequisites backlog.

tasks.title: Make gateway tenant enforcement real
tasks.description: Two changes in the gateway: (1) remove the tenantBypassPrefixes entries in src/gateway/internal/middleware/tenant.go:27-49 that exempt real trading endpoints (/api/v1/orders, /clearing, /margin, /settlement, /warehouse, /participants, /compliance, /market-data, /securities, /auth, /admin) — keep only genuine platform-level/health bypasses, so core traffic without a tenant header is rejected per the directive. (2) Forward the resolved tenant_id to gRPC/HTTP backends by adding it to src/gateway/internal/proxy/backend.go BackendRequest.Metadata (:17-24). Keep the single-tenant default (ace-commodities) working for existing clients via the admin-ui/web-ui X-GarudaX-Tenant header already sent.

tasks.title: Gateway tenant enforcement tests
tasks.description: Add tests proving the gateway rejects core trading-endpoint requests with no/invalid X-GarudaX-Tenant (401 TENANT_REQUIRED / 403 UNKNOWN_TENANT) and that a valid tenant is forwarded to the backend metadata. Cover the path-bypass whitelist so health/platform endpoints still pass without a tenant.

tasks.title: Re-scope tenancy docs to reality
tasks.description: Make the docs truthful. In README.md, AiX_Project_Knowledge.md (and flag CLAUDE.md edits for the postmortem step): (1) describe the platform as single-tenant-with-namespacing today — ace_* schema namespace + tenant-aware API surface, with one live tenant (ace-commodities); (2) add an explicit 'MSE onboarding prerequisites' backlog listing the deferred work (row-level tenant_id columns + WHERE filtering, platform.tenants-backed registry, working provisioner for schemas/IAM/Kafka/Redis/dashboards, mse_* schemas, per-tenant IRSA/KMS); (3) fix drift: correct service count (14 not 11), remove the phantom src/clearing-service reference, reconcile the garudax/ vs ace-platform root name, and mark roadmap phases whose code exists. Do not overstate enforcement beyond what R011 actually ships.

tasks.title: Re-enable CI build+test gate
tasks.description: Convert .github/workflows/deploy.yml.disabled (and any disabled CI) into an active workflow that, on PR/merge, builds every Go service and runs unit tests (skip the e2e graceful-skip suite or run it only in a full-stack job). Gate merges to main on green. Keep cloud-deploy steps disabled/guarded — this is a build+test gate, not a deploy.

tasks.title: Fresh full-stack integration run
tasks.description: Run the full stack via docker-compose with a real Kafka broker (KAFKA_BROKERS set) and execute the e2e suite against the live gateway so tests do not graceful-skip. Confirm the 3 historical e2e bug classes are actually fixed now (gateway 404-before-auth via RouteChecker, compliance KYC object response, cross-service event propagation over real Kafka). Write the verdict to handoff/integration-run-<id>.md replacing the stale 2026-03-29 FAIL. Report both statement-weighted and business-logic coverage per the documented methodology.

tasks.title: Refresh CLAUDE.md metrics
tasks.description: Update the CLAUDE.md learned-patterns metrics to current reality or mark the March baselines explicitly historical: record true test counts (~2770 Test funcs + subtests, not 1199), the current service count (14), the real latest integration verdict from R015, and note that the '6 unfixed e2e bugs' narrative is resolved. This is a postmortem-style edit to CLAUDE.md (owned by the postmortem step), driven by R015's results.

tasks.title: Repository hygiene
tasks.description: Clean up: (1) delete the ~111 merged worktree-agent-* git branches (keep main + any unmerged); (2) commit or revert the 4 dirty working-tree files (nginx config, demo-runner tsbuildinfo, .softhouse/patterns.md, test-results); (3) finish or remove the 5 zero-byte Terraform stub modules (vpc, elasticache, iam, s3, security-groups) that main.tf wires in but which would fail terraform apply — at minimum stop wiring non-existent modules; (4) remove or fill the V2-V5 zero-byte migration stubs (real DDL starts at V6); (5) reconcile corporate-actions — it is imported as a library but listed as a service with no main.go/Dockerfile: either add a runnable entrypoint or document it as a library and drop it from the service list.

tasks.title: corporate-actions float→decimal
tasks.description: Migrate the standalone corporate-actions module to the shared decimal type. R006 audit found the ENTIRE engine on float64: dividend cash, rights subscription cost, split/ex-rights price, and a float round2 (engine.go:89,102,108,124 Value/SubscriptionCost/AmountPerShare/SubscriptionPrice; :198 round2; :225 Value=round2(qty*AmountPerShare); :319 SubscriptionCost; :257 SplitAdjustedPrice; :332 TheoreticalExRightsPrice). Module is zero-dep and does NOT import shared decimal. NOT currently wired (no cmd/main.go) so not live — but MUST be migrated before it is wired. Add go.mod replace ../shared/pkg/types/decimal; convert money fields+arithmetic; replace round2 with banker's rounding; also fix securities handlers_corporate_actions.go:233 dividend entitlementValue float and the EntitlementValue field.

tasks.title: compliance-service MCSD/FRC money→decimal
tasks.description: R006 audit found residual float money paths in compliance-service MSE integration/reporting: corporate-action cash entitlement, settlement amount, settlement-fail penalties, with float round2=int64(f*100±0.5). Sites: integration/mcsd.go:114,149 SettlementAmount, :175 CashEntitlement, :499 CashEntitlement=round2(qty*RatioOrAmount), :553-557 round2; reporting/frc.go:111 TotalValue, :133 FailValue, :134 PenaltyAmount, :144 TotalPenalty, :507-511 round2. Convert to shared decimal. Surveillance package floats (22) are non-money risk scores/thresholds — leave as float64.

tasks.title: gateway fees + pre-trade risk →decimal
tasks.description: R006 audit found the gateway computes trading FEES and PRE-TRADE RISK order-value/limit checks in float64 — both money paths. internal/fees/calculator.go: CalculateFee(tradeValue float64,…), TotalFee/RateBPS/MinFee/MaxFee/PerContractFee float64, roundTo4 float; internal/risk/pretrade.go: Price/Quantity float64, CheckOrder/CheckPriceBand(lastPrice float64), store.go MaxOrderValue/MaxLong/MaxShort/MaxGross float64. Convert to shared decimal. Leave gateway reporting/observability/middleware/tickets/bot floats (metrics/SLA/rate-limit) as float64.

tasks.title: fix-gateway price mapper →decimal
tasks.description: R006 audit found fix-gateway carries FIX order Price/StopPrice as float64 through the protocol mapper. internal/fix/mapper.go:39,40 Price/StopPrice, :121 MapExecutionReport(price float64), :204 formatPrice; parser.go:223 GetFloatTag. FIX tags are strings on the wire, but price-bearing — round-trip via shared decimal (ParseDecimal on inbound tag, String() on outbound) to avoid float drift.

tasks.title: R0-extension money-path re-audit
tasks.description: After R018-R021, re-run the money-path audit across corporate-actions, compliance-service, gateway, fix-gateway (and re-confirm the 6 engines + securities) to verify zero residual float64 money math platform-wide. Write verdict to handoff/R022.md.

tasks.title: gateway reporting generator →decimal
tasks.description: R022 re-audit found one latent residual: gateway/internal/reporting/generator.go computes settlement-statement P&L, fee totals, net amount, and market-summary OHLC in float64 (PositionInput/MarginInput/FeeInput/TradeInput/PositionSnapshot/PnLDetail money fields + roundTo4), and reporting/store.go scans/stores OHLC + money columns as float64. Currently DORMANT (Generate* not wired to a live route) but must be migrated before wiring. Convert to shared decimal (mirror R020 fees/risk recipe + decFromFloat DB shim); keep HTTP wire shape (decimal marshals as bare JSON number). Also fold the reporting/store.go DB-at-rest float columns into this (or the R011 *_raw migration) so settlement net-amounts persist exactly.

tasks.title: Implement real cross-service Kafka event propagation
tasks.description: Close the last historical e2e bug class (#3), confirmed OPEN by R015's fresh full-stack run: events do not actually flow matching-engine -> clearing-engine -> margin-engine -> settlement-engine across separate processes. R007 already made wiring fail-fast (no silent in-process fallback when KAFKA_BROKERS set) and a real segmentio/kafka-go writer exists; R024 must finish the real wire path. Scope: (1) ensure every engine's internal/kafka has BOTH a real wire-protocol Producer AND Consumer (segmentio/kafka-go) selected when KAFKA_BROKERS is set, behind the existing Producer/Consumer interfaces; (2) wire each downstream engine to actually SUBSCRIBE to and CONSUME the upstream topic it needs (matching trade-executed -> clearing; clearing position -> margin; margin/settlement chain), using the {tenant_id}.{domain}.{event} topic convention (tenant=ace-commodities default) and the shared kafka tenant router where applicable; (3) idempotent consume + DLQ/retry already exist in the channel adapter — preserve them in the real adapter; (4) add an integration test under tests/ that, against a real broker (docker compose, KAFKA_BROKERS set), publishes an order/trade on matching-engine's topic and asserts the clearing/margin/settlement consumers process it end-to-end across processes — graceful-skip when no broker. Verify go build/test green for all engines; do NOT regress R007 fail-fast or R008 concurrency fixes. Reference R015 handoff (handoff/integration-run-20260626-051039.md) for the exact gap + the 3 infra defects it flagged.
